content: Implemented payment request module (migration 069, repo, routes, tests). Key design: draft->submitted workflow, auto-computes totals/dates/vendor from invoices, validates invoices are in ready_for_payment status. Exposed PaymentRequest and PaymentRequestItem types from db crate via pub use. Submit transitions invoices to 'payment_submitted' processing status.
summary: Payment request module: draft->submit workflow with invoice batching
